{{Infobox technique
| name = Jade cycling technique
| introduced = cradle-03-blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Every [[Path]] has their own [[Jade cycling technique]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c6">''Blackflame'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] possesses a [[Jade cycling technique]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c2">''Uncrowned'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The main [[Path]] of the Black Flame uses a [[Jade cycling technique]] that focuses on power.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c16">''Uncrowned'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
